---
name: Bypass Report
about: Report a successful bypass of Arbiter's automated reviewer
labels: bypass
---

## What did you bypass?

Which detection did you get past? (capability detection, invariant rules, scope analysis, etc.)

## How did you do it?

Describe the technique. Link to the PR if it's still open.

## What should Arbiter have caught?

What pattern or behavior should have been detected?

## Suggested fix

If you have an idea for how to detect this, describe it here.
